//: Pylance/Pyright configuration for the VECTRIX repo.
This repo has two independent Python source roots, neither of which is
frontend_py6/   the PySide6 desktop app. main.py runs from inside this
directory, so its own imports are top-level absolute:
Without extraPaths, Pylance roots only at the repo root and reports
every `modules.*` and `core.*` import in frontend_py6 as unresolved,
even though the app runs correctly. That is a false positive from the
editor, not a defect in the code.
Keep frontend_py6 FIRST. The repo root contains a legacy main.py that
shadows frontend_py6/main.py when the root is searched first — the same
collision that breaks `import main` at runtime if sys.path is ordered
//pythonVersion: Match your interpreter. Adjust if you are not on 3.12.
